body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Adds 3 tutorials:
- changing soil parameterizations (based on getting_started.md)
- changing canopy parameterizations (based on default_canopy.jl)
- changing snowy land parameterizations (based on snowy_land_fluxnet_tutorial.jl)

Also does the following:
- adds all exported objects and functions to the API docs
- fixes the canopy temperature diagnostic compute function to work with the prescribed temperature model
title: Add tutorials changing parameterizations
